results.label: 报告图片与 false-green 快速检查
results.command:
/mnt/c/workspace/interview_service/.venv/bin/python -c from pathlib import Path; import re; report=Path('docs/reports/P8_JD_INTAKE_ACCEPTANCE_REPORT.html'); html=report.read_text(encoding='utf-8'); missing=[]
for src in re.findall(r'<img[^>]+src="([^"]+)"', html):
 p=(report.parent/src).resolve();
 missing.append(src) if (not p.exists() or p.stat().st_size <= 1024) else None
forbidden=['BOSS '+'已接入','招聘平台自动'+'接入通过','真实 provider '+'质量通过','真实个人资料路径'+'通过','自动投递'+'已实现','Scenario did not define '+'multi-turn dialogue evidence','No screenshots '+'captured']
hits=[m for m in forbidden if m in html]
print(f'image refs={len(re.findall(r"<img[^>]+src=\"([^\"]+)\"", html))}; missing={missing}; forbidden={hits}')
raise SystemExit(1 if missing or hits else 0)
